title: Finite Circle Geometry Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite circle-geometry bad radius QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact coordinate replay computes squared radius 2 for the malformed unit-circle point (1,1), but the row claims squared radius 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional circle-geometry rows only when they add distinct tangent, chord, inversion, cyclic-configuration, or polynomial-geometry pressure; keep general Euclidean circle theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed rational circle-geometry rows as deterministic exact-coordinate replay obligations.
Replay point-on-circle, tangent-line, chord-midpoint, and perpendicularity witnesses over exact rationals.
Route rejected finite circle-radius claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the radius-squared value.
Keep general Euclidean circle theorems, inversion, power-of-a-point, and cyclic-quadrilateral claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
